{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324092354908537953FEAFAA449EC"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615026552197612313","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773018743,"group_id":"7599551509008763928","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5IqGd2a/WTPZYUUlpoKHJ4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873648&x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"18333863435","user_name":"喜欢黑土豆的胡延"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"18333863435","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599551509008763928","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越】+【架空】+【轻松】+【种田】+【碾压】+【基建狂魔】+【工业发展】+【古代战争】
意外被炸飞天的朱昊天带着洞天福地来到大武王朝，本想做个逍遥公子，奈何实力不允许。
从小建立自己的势力，从衣食住行四个方面下手让自己富甲天下。
本想逍遥自在，笑看九龙夺嫡，偏偏有人拉他下水，还想灭了自己家族。
那还能忍？忍无可忍、无需再忍。
那就造反试试，试试就试试。
区区造反而已，区区攻城略地而已，区区统一大陆而已。
等到整个大陆国泰民安之后，让位给自己的儿子，带着美女老婆和侍女去游山玩水、逍遥快活去了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od6d745b2ec2cf52b0a2691146f458dfa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"倚栏听雨的民夫","author_id":"","book_id":"7599551509008763928","book_name":"穿越之一不小心统一大陆","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f08848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599556273054433817","read_count":"20","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"129699"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"60","tags":"历史古代","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od6d745b2ec2cf52b0a2691146f458dfa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499434&x-signature=JFbp5vOcrI%2FgZnrGgtM26bRu8yE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108702401408","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324092354908537953FEAFAA449EC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773021489,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7599551509008763928","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":12,"score_text":
